changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status;
alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED', 'ACT_SENT', 'CLOSED', 'ERROR'));

rollback.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status;
alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'ACTION_REQUIRED', 'FINISHED', 'ACT_SENT', 'CLOSED', 'ERROR'));
